Bridge of the Americas Port of Entry
crossings.port_name: Bridge of the Americas Port of Entry

crossings.name: Brownsville - Gateway
crossings.construction_notice: Ready Lane is now operational at Gateway Bridge - Lane 1.  Tune in to AM 1610 for border crossing information.

crossings.name: Del Rio
crossings.construction_notice:
Ready Lane is open from 6AM until MIDNIGHT seven days a week.  Ready Lane is on the far left as you approach.

Go to www.GetYouHome.gov for more information.

crossings.name: Eagle Pass - Bridge II
crossings.construction_notice: File FinCEN105 - Currency and Monetary Instrument Report (CMIR)online at https://fincen105.cbp.dhs.gov/ Provide confirmation number to CBP Officer upon making entry or departing the U.S.

crossings.name: El Paso - Bridge of the Americas (BOTA)
crossings.construction_notice: BOTA Passenger/Ready Lanes is open west side of port; Passenger Hrs 24 hours/7days, BOTA CARGO Mon-FRI 6 am to 4 pm. SAT/SUN CLOSED. Tune into AM 1610 for info.

crossings.name: El Paso - Paso Del Norte (PDN)
crossings.construction_notice: Ready Lanes are open at PDN.  See www.getyouhome.gov for more information. Tune in to AM 1620 for border crossing information.

crossings.name: El Paso - Stanton DCL
crossings.construction_notice: Be prepared for construction that may cause some delays in the southbound lanes of the Stanton bridge; early January - February.  Tune in to AM 1620 for border crossing information.

crossings.name: El Paso - Ysleta
crossings.construction_notice: YSL Passenger/Ready Lanes is open west side of port; Passenger Hrs. 24 hours / 7 days, YSL CARGO Mon-FRI 6 am to Midnight. SAT 6 am to 2 pm. Tune into AM 1610 for info.

crossings.name: Laredo - Bridge II
crossings.construction_notice:
Ready Lanes are open from 8AM - Midnight seven days a week.

Go to www.GetYouHome.gov for more information.

crossings.name: Marcelino Serna - Tornillo
crossings.construction_notice: CARGO Monday-Friday 8 am to 4 pm. Saturday/Sunday Closed.

crossings.name: Nogales - Deconcini
crossings.construction_notice:
Ready Lane is open from 6AM - 10PM seven days a week.  Ready Lane is on the left side as you approach the port.
Go to www.GetYouHome.gov for more information.

crossings.name: Otay Mesa
crossings.construction_notice:
Entrance to Ready Lanes is on the far left as you approach the border.  Go to www.getyouhome.gov for more information

Go to www.GetYouHome.gov for more information.

crossings.name: Progreso - Donna International Bridge
crossings.construction_notice: Ready Lane is open from 9am until 2pm. Go to www.getyouhome.gov for more information.

crossings.name: Progreso - Progreso International Bridge
crossings.construction_notice: The Pedestrian Ready lanes will be open daily from 12noon to 5pm.

crossings.name: San Luis - San Luis I
crossings.construction_notice: A Ready Lane is now open at the San Luis Port of Entry from 6:00 until midnight.  Go to www.getyouhome.gov for more information on Ready Lanes.  Tune in to AM 530 for border crossing information.

crossings.name: Santa Teresa - Santa Teresa Port of Entry
